name: Maresin 1
summary: Macrophage-derived DHA-family specialized pro-resolving mediator tested as an aged-animal bone-regeneration intervention.
mechanism_summary: Promotes resolution of aged macrophage inflammation and pro-repair macrophage signaling, with aged-mouse fracture data linking MaR1 treatment to improved callus remodeling and mechanical repair.

open_questions: Whether MaR1 can be delivered safely and reproducibly in humans
Whether aged-mouse fracture repair generalizes to other aged tissues
Whether macrophage phenotype changes can be measured as a clinically useful repair biomarker
